# Predictive History — Substack crosswalk (Volume VII)

**Canonical publication:** [Predictive History on Substack](https://predictivehistory.substack.com/) (primary written surface; see [work-jiang-sources.md](../../../../docs/skill-work/work-jiang/work-jiang-sources.md)). In-repo essay mirrors are **Volume VII** of the multivolume book line — see [book/VOLUME-VII-SUBSTACK.md](../book/VOLUME-VII-SUBSTACK.md).

This folder holds **operator-maintained notes** that map **individual posts** to the **in-repo book corpus** (`lectures/`, `analysis/`). **Full essay text** (for search / diff / claim extraction) lives in **[essays/](essays/)** — optional mirrors the operator ingests; **copyright and Substack terms** are the operator’s responsibility (see [essays/README.md](essays/README.md)).

**Convention:** One section per post slug (`/p/<slug>`). Add new sections as needed.

**Iran-war Substack arc (chronological, 2026):** **Countdown to Iran** (Feb 21) → **World War III Begins** (Feb 28) → **The Acceleration** (Mar 7) → **Vietnam Redux** (Mar 14) → **The US-Iran End Game** (Mar 21). Sections below are ordered **newest first**; **Countdown to Iran** is the **last** section.

---

## Vietnam Redux (`vietnam-redux`)

- **URL:** https://predictivehistory.substack.com/p/vietnam-redux  
- **Date (published):** 2026-03-14  
- **Deck:** An American occupation of Kharg Island would start another forever war. Trump may have no choice.
- **Curated essay:** [essays/vietnam-redux.md](essays/vietnam-redux.md)
- **Analysis memo:** [../analysis/ss-vietnam-redux-analysis.md](../analysis/ss-vietnam-redux-analysis.md)

**Serial note:** Follows **The Acceleration** (2026-03-07). Immediately precedes **The US-Iran End Game** (2026-03-21; first section in this file), which opens with “As I discussed last week, Kharg Island…”

### Overlap with in-repo corpus (same thesis threads)

| Substack theme | In-repo touchpoints |
|----------------|---------------------|

| **Vietnam** analogy, **mission creep**, **sunk cost**, **forever war** | **Geo #8**; **GT #16**; [Geo-Strategy #11 — Second American Civil War](../lectures/geo-strategy-11-the-second-american-civil-war.md) (draft / domestic fracture themes) |

| **Russia** / **China** continue support; **sanctions** / **oil** payback; **Graham** “best money” line | **GT #16**; **Geo #10**; **Interviews** Ukraine–Iran arcs (**Tucker #11**, **Nima #8**) |
| **Ukraine** parallels (**Nordstream**, frozen **$300B** assets, failed offensives, **Dec 2025** drone / peace scuttling) | [Geo-Strategy #10](../lectures/geo-strategy-10-putins-strategic-imagination.md); [Interviews #11 — Tucker](../lectures/interviews-11-tucker-carlson-iran-war-and-global-order.md); granular dates/lines may be essay-only |

## The Acceleration (`the-acceleration`)

- **URL:** https://predictivehistory.substack.com/p/the-acceleration  
- **Date (published):** 2026-03-07  
- **Deck:** An American ground invasion of Iran would be a disaster. That’s the plan.
- **Curated essay:** [essays/the-acceleration.md](essays/the-acceleration.md)
- **Analysis memo:** [../analysis/ss-the-acceleration-analysis.md](../analysis/ss-the-acceleration-analysis.md)

**Serial note:** Follows **World War III Begins** (2026-02-28; last section in this file). First **March** installment in the chain; sets up **Kurds** / northwest **Iran**, **acceleration** frame, **draft** / **National Guard**, **“lose to save the world”** line, then pivots to **Breaking Points** appearance and long **esoteric** / **eschatological** argument (**Kabbalah**, **Chabad**, **Epstein**, **Freemasonry**, **Hegseth** / **Third Temple**, **Al-Aqsa** false-flag script, **Gog and Magog**). Continued in **Vietnam Redux** (Kharg / Vietnam) and **The US-Iran End Game** (Basel / Pax Judaica).

| Substack theme | In-repo touchpoints |
|----------------|---------------------|
